description: Use this API to delete specified data point in an existing non-conventional source fault contribution table. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.2.0. ierr = seq_ncs_table_purg_onept(name, tpt)

parameters.name: tpt
parameters.description: Table time or voltage at a point in data table where ti, ci or vi, ci data is purged. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
